title: HyperMoE: Towards Better Mixture of Experts via Transferring Among Experts
authors: Not explicitly stated in the provided text
problem: Trade-off in Mixture of Experts (MoE) models between selecting more experts (improving performance) and maintaining sparsity (reducing computational costs)
proposed_solution: HyperMoE, a framework built upon hypernetworks that transfers knowledge from unselected experts to selected experts while maintaining sparsity
key_contributions: Cross-layer Hypernetworks for information flow among MoEs in different layers
Improved efficiency in parameters and computational costs

methodology.core_concept: Using hypernetworks to capture information from every expert and achieve positive expert transfer by generating conditioned modules individually
components: HyperExperts: Generated based on unselected experts' information to supplement selected experts while maintaining sparsity
Expert-shared hypernetwork: Captures information from every expert
Cross-layer Hypernetworks: Shared among all transformer layers to enable information flow among MoEs in different layers
